title: organization-diagnosis brief metadata v0.1
description: Validates YAML frontmatter from Markdown briefs after safe parsing into a JSON-compatible object. Covers brief generation metadata only—not Markdown body content. register_snapshot_hash algorithm and content reconciliation, and Manifest consistency, are future generator/validator responsibilities.

generated_at.description: When the brief file itself was generated. Authoritative source for Manifest briefs[].generated_at cache.

generated_from_registers_at.description: Reference timestamp when the register set used for brief generation was obtained or fixed. Not a substitute for register_snapshot_hash; tracks the generation-source time.

briefScope.description: Whether the brief covers a single MTG session or a diagnosis cycle spanning one or more MTG sessions.

sourceMtgSessionIdList.description: MTG session IDs that sourced this brief. Exactly one when brief_scope is mtg_session; one or more when diagnosis_cycle.

registerSnapshotHash.description: Optional opaque register snapshot hash value. Hash algorithm, source material, ordering, canonicalization, and encoding are intentionally unspecified in v0.1.
